text.title: Retrieval Drift Alerting Recipe — Procedure
text.summary: Six-step procedure: capture baseline → compute nightly metrics → wire alerts → install safer-mode gate → drill rollback → schedule baseline refresh.

step.name: capture-baseline
step.input: ≥2 weeks of stable production retrieval logs (query vectors, retrieved IDs, scores)
step.action: Run `scripts/baseline-refresh.py --window 14d --output baseline_YYYY_MM.parquet`. Confirm no incident events overlap the window; reject if any P1 was open.
step.decision-gate: If query volume in window <1000 — extend window; baseline on small sample is fragile (r1-baseline-freshness).

step.name: compute-nightly-metrics
step.input: Last 24h of production logs + frozen baseline
step.action: Compute four metrics: query-embedding KL divergence vs baseline, retrieval-set Jaccard drift on top-10 IDs, score-histogram KS-statistic, neighbour-recency (median doc timestamp).
step.decision-gate: If any of the four metrics is missing data — fail-loud, do not silently zero-fill (r2-four-metric-coverage).

step.name: wire-alerts
step.action: Install Prometheus rules from `templates/prometheus-rules.yaml`. Route P1 (immediate page) when ≥2 metrics breach OR magnitude >3σ; P3 (ticket) when single metric breach 1σ-3σ sustained ≥60min.
step.decision-gate: If alert routing matrix missing for a metric class — STOP; unrouted alert = alarm-fatigue source (r3-routing-by-severity).

step.name: install-safer-mode-gate
step.input: Feature-flag system + safer-mode handler in app code
step.action: Wire the alerting backend to flip a feature flag that switches RAG response from synthesised answer to "citations-only" mode while drift is active. Verify the flag is applied within 60s of breach.
step.output: Auto-gate live; test in pre-prod by injecting a synthetic drift event
step.decision-gate: If gate cannot be deployed (no feature-flag infra) — block recipe rollout; bare alerts without gate are unactionable (r4-safer-mode-gate).

step.name: drill-the-rollback
step.action: Replay 24h of logs with shifted query distribution. Verify alert fires, gate engages, on-call receives explanation, manual rollback works (re-embed or revert embedding-model version).
step.decision-gate: If on-call cannot resolve in ≤30min in drill — improve runbook before deploying live.

step.name: schedule-baseline-refresh
step.action: After recontract event, run `scripts/baseline-refresh.py` to capture new baseline; require human approval. Old baseline archived, never deleted.
step.output: New baseline parquet + audit log entry
step.decision-gate: If recontract fires too often (>1×/quarter) — investigate upstream instability, not just baseline drift (r5-recontract-trigger).
